name: python3-partd
title: python3-partd
description:
Appendable key-value storage for Python 3
Key-value byte store with appendable values
.
- Partd stores key-value pairs.
- Values are raw bytes.
- Appends on old values.
.
Partd excels at shuffling operations.
.
This contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-partd because Appendable key-value storage for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-partd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-partd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-partd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
